creator: grahamperrin@freebsd.org
text:
From <https://www.freebsd.org/copyright/trademarks/>: 

> Apple, FireWire, Mac, Macintosh, Mac OS, Quicktime, and TrueType are 
> trademarks of Apple Computer, Inc., registered in the United States and 
> other countries.

The "Apple Computer, Inc." part might be outdated. Compare with <https://www.apple.com/legal/intellectual-property/trademark/appletmlist.html>, which: 

* does     use the phrase Apple Inc.
* does not use the phrase Apple Computer
